news.t: First Trust Announces Shareholder Approval of the New Sub-Advisory Agreement for First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Domestic ETF and Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting for First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Developed International ETF
First Trust Announces Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting for First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Domestic ETF and First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Developed International ETF

holdings.infoBox: HUSV is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cisco Systems stock at 3.67%, Apple at 2.85%, VeriSign at 2.84%, Gen Digital at 2.76%, and Teledyne Technologies at 2.44%.

overview.description: The First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Domestic ETF (HUSV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund that uses volatility forecasting to select and weight large-cap US stocks. HUSV was launched on Aug 24, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.
